/.title: LotFile - WA R-Code & Planning Compliance Checker

/app.title: LotFile - WA R-Code & Planning Compliance Checker

live_verifier_failures: verifier checkout_checked evidence was not true
LIVE_CHECKOUT_URL or VITE_CHECKOUT_URL is required for strict live launch verification

unblock: Set a real Stripe Payment Link in /srv/draftcheck/app/infra/v3/.env as VITE_CHECKOUT_URL=https://buy.stripe.com/...
Deploy the web bundle with: ssh draftcheck 'bash /srv/draftcheck/app/infra/v3/deploy-web-only.sh'
Run: cd web && npm run verify:launch:live:strict

evidence.uptime_targets: uv run python scripts/ops_guardrails.py uptime-targets --json returned status ok for lotfile.app health and ready
evidence.uptime_monitor_doc: critical: pending monitor evidence: LotFile health.provider_id, LotFile health.alert_contact, LotFile ready.provider_id, LotFile ready.alert_contact

unblock: Provision RESTIC_REPOSITORY and RESTIC_PASSWORD_FILE outside git, then run the backup.env setup command in docs/ops/ops-guardrails.md.
Run the restore drill and verify the filled log with: python scripts/ops_guardrails.py restore-drill-log --path docs/ops/restore-drill-YYYYMMDD.md --json
Provision the external uptime monitors and replace pending values in docs/ops/uptime-monitor.md.
Run: sudo SENTRY_DSN=<dsn> bash /srv/draftcheck/app/infra/v3/ops/install-sentry-dsn.sh, then rerun with DRAFTCHECK_RESTART_SERVICES=1 when api/worker/hermes can restart.
